PreInvocation.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" && GC_PROVIDER_SESSION_ID_REQUIRED=antigravity GC_PROVIDER_SESSION_ID="${ANTIGRAVITY_CONVERSATION_ID:-}" GC_MANAGED_SESSION_HOOK=1 GC_HOOK_EVENT_NAME=SessionStart gc prime --hook --hook-format antigravity
